pi_items.source: Verified via setup_task.sh where data is downloaded from NCBI eutils using ID U55763.1.
Verified via setup_task.sh where data is downloaded from NCBI eutils using ID NM_022818.5.
Verified via setup_task.sh efetch URL explicitly querying the nucleotide db at eutils.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov.
Confirmed from the explicit prompt description.
Consistent with the context of designing a fusion protein to track autophagy in live cells.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on real genomic data downloaded directly from NCBI GenBank via eutils, specifically the pEGFP-C1 vector (U55763.1) and MAP1LC3B transcript (NM_022818.5). Due to the annotation of the pEGFP-C1 multiple cloning site within its CDS feature, its actual CDS length is 798 bp, which differs from the standard EGFP length (720 bp) mistakenly listed in the verifier's hardcoded fallback.
